q: Select the INCORRECT option with reference to the Chipko Andolan.
o: People realised that forests are needed to maintain the quality of soil
It forced the government to rethink their priorities in the use of forest produce
It was a violent movement to save the trees
It involved the community in forest conservation efforts

q: From point 'X', a person walks 40 m towards the east. He then takes a left turn and walks 40 m. He then takes a right turn and walks 50 m. He then takes a right turn and walks 30 m to reach point 'Y'. He then turns left and walks 20 m. Finally, he takes a right turn and walks 15 m to reach point 'Z'. (All turns are 90 degree turns only). In which direction is point 'Z' from point 'X'?

The current through a horizontal straight wire flows from west to east. The direction of the magnetic field lines as viewed from the east end will be:
o: anticlockwise in a plane perpendicular to the wire
anticlockwise in the plane of the wire
clockwise in a plane perpendicular to the wire
clockwise in the plane of the wire

A statement is given followed by two assumptions numbered I and II. You have to assume everything in the statement to be true and decide which of the two assumptions is/are implicit in the statement.
Statement:
Due to the failure of the main grid, power supply to many parts of the city was affected.
Assumptions:
I. The main grid is responsible for transmission of power to different parts of the city.
II. Most people have backup power installations at their homes to manage during times when power supply is disrupted.
o: Both assumptions I and II are implicit
Neither assumption I nor II is implicit

Three statements are given, followed by two conclusions numbered I and II. Assuming the statements to be true, even if they seem to be at variance with commonly known facts, decide which of the conclusions logically follow(s) from the statements.
Statements:
1. All jokers are clowns.
2. All clowns are sportsmen.
3. Some jokers are spectacles.
Conclusions:
I. Some sportsmen are spectacles.
II. Some clowns are jokers.
o: Both conclusions I and II follow
Neither conclusion I nor II follows
